methods.description: This method describes the process of culturing E. huxleyi and Chaetoceros sp. under controlled laboratory conditions to simulate modern ocean-atmosphere gas exchange and study the effects of alkalinity enhancement on phytoplankton growth.

steps.description: Monospecific cultures of E. huxleyi and Chaetoceros sp. were grown at 15°C in nutrient-enriched filtered seawater under cool fluorescent light.
steps.searchable_summary: grow phytoplankton cultures in controlled temperature and light conditions

steps.description: Cultures were bubbled with 420 (±2%) ppm CO2 balanced air to simulate modern ocean-atmosphere gas exchange.
steps.searchable_summary: bubble cultures with CO2 balanced air

steps.description: Culture media were prepared in acid-rinsed 20-liter polycarbonate carboys using natural seawater enriched with nutrients and trace metals.
steps.searchable_summary: prepare culture media with enriched seawater

steps.description: To simulate calcium-containing alkalinity enhancement, Na2CO3 and CaCl2 H4O2 were added to treatment media.
steps.searchable_summary: add Na2CO3 and CaCl2 to simulate alkalinity enhancement

steps.description: Culture media were filtered through a 0.22-μm sterile polyethersulfone filter and stored overnight at room temperature.
Pseudo-triplicate samples were collected from each carboy, and 1-liter aliquots of filtered culture media were distributed into 2-liter Nalgene PC bottles.
The culture media were bubbled before inoculation with phytoplankton cells to bring carbonate system conditions within model-predicted OAE scenarios.
steps.searchable_summary: bubble media to adjust carbonate system

steps.description: Inoculate culture media with stock cultures of E. huxleyi or Chaetoceros sp. and begin sample collection immediately after inoculation.
steps.searchable_summary: inoculate media with phytoplankton and start sample collection

steps.description: Continue each experiment until cells have been exposed to experimental conditions for >7 generations.
steps.searchable_summary: continue experiment for more than 7 generations
